metadata.description: The owner of the mobile tavern, Boar Hat, and the leader of The Seven Deadly Sins, who were wanted for the crime of attempting to overthrow the kingdom. Currently, he is traveling with Elizabeth, the third princess of Liones, searching for the members of The Seven Deadly Sins who are scattered throughout the land.

world_passive.name: Captain's Acumen
world_passive.description: Allows double jumps and wall runs.

compatible_weapons.name: Black Flame Wings Axe
compatible_weapons.effect: Activating a Burst increases Attack by 28% and Crit Chance by 6% for 10 sec.
compatible_weapons.description: An Axe imbued with ominous black magic. Its profound darkness threatens to devour all light.

compatible_weapons.name: Blazing Axe
compatible_weapons.effect: Attacking an enemy whose remaining HP is 100% or higher increases their damage taken by 20% for 20 sec.
compatible_weapons.description: An Axe imbued with intense heat, as fierce as hellfire. Its blazing power can melt any enemy it faces.

compatible_weapons.name: Crimson Flame Axe
compatible_weapons.effect: Activating a Burst increases Attack by 28% for 10 sec.
compatible_weapons.description: An Axe forged with an inextinguishable flame bound by ancient magic. It possesses enough power to incinerate even the soul of its foe.

compatible_weapons.name: Jet-black Axe
compatible_weapons.effect: 20% chance to increase Crit Chance by 50% for 7 sec when using the Ultimate Move.
compatible_weapons.description: An Axe crafted from ores imbued with jet-black darkness. The power of deep darkness devours the souls of all enemies.

compatible_weapons.name: Ruler of the Forest Axe
compatible_weapons.effect: 20% chance to increase a certain skill type's damage by 8% for 15 sec when landing an attack. (Cooldown: 25 sec)
compatible_weapons.description: The Axe of the Werebear chieftain who rules the forest. When swung with power, nothing can withstand its strike.

compatible_weapons.name: Adventurer's Axe
compatible_weapons.description: An ordinary Axe used by adventurers. It's easy to use, making it a popular choice for training.

compatible_weapons.name: Artisan's Fine Axe
compatible_weapons.description: An Axe born from the delicate hands of a master craftsman. Its sturdy yet refined finish is remarkable.

compatible_weapons.name: Blessed Axe
compatible_weapons.description: An Axe imbued with the blessing of a renowned mage. Despite its plain appearance, it delivers excellent performance in battle.

compatible_weapons.name: Guardian's Axe
compatible_weapons.description: An Axe imbued with the spirit of a holy knight who once protected the kingdom. The noble will of the guardian adds power to the weapon.

compatible_weapons.description: An Axe crafted from a frost crystal that enhances combat power. The potent magic of this entity quickly became part of the weapon.

Inflicts damage equal to 411% of Attack.
